# Tasks - 2026-06-29

Implementation breakdown for the four issues now visible on the
`auto-implement` queue. No tasks file is generated for #868 because
it shipped yesterday (PR #871).

Order matches the pipeline's natural oldest-first pick: #862 ->
#864 -> #867 -> #869. The research brief's "low-risk first" order
is identical given today's queue.

## Issue #862: [mcp] Sanitize and cap MCP tool names

- **T862.1** In `src/mcp/client.ts`, add a pure helper
  `sanitizeMcpToolName(serverName: string, toolName: string): string`:
  replace `[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+` runs with `_`, join as
  `mcp__<server>__<tool>`, hash-suffix if `> 64` chars (truncate
  then append 8-char SHA-256 prefix of the original
  `serverName + '__' + toolName`). Exact-64 stays as-is.
- **T862.2** Add a per-manager `toolNameMap: Map<sanitized, { server,
  rawName }>` populated alongside `cachedTools` so reverse lookup is
  O(1).
- **T862.3** Wire into `mapToolInfo`: cache `sanitized` as
  `McpToolInfo.name`, store raw in the map.
- **T862.4** Update `findToolServer` and `callTool` to consult the
  map and forward the raw name to the MCP SDK.
- **T862.5** Add `tests/mcp/sanitize.test.ts`: long name truncation
  + hash determinism, illegal-char replacement, collision case
  (two raw names mapping to the same prefix differ by hash).
- **T862.6** Run the full gate (`lint && typecheck && format:check
  && test:coverage && build`) green.

## Issue #864: [command] /queue list and /queue clear

- **T864.1** In `src/cli/interactive.ts`, locate the slash-command
  `switch` (near the `case 'mcp':` block) and add `case 'queue':`.
  Default subcommand is `list`.
- **T864.2** `/queue` / `/queue list`: read `state.submitPromptQueue`,
  print 1-based indexed entries with 80-char preview (reuse the
  truncation helper already used for the `enqueued follow-up` log).
- **T864.3** `/queue clear`: empty `submitPromptQueue` (mutate in
  place to keep refs stable).
- **T864.4** `/queue clear <N>`: parse `N`, splice. On NaN or
  out-of-range, print a yellow usage hint and do not mutate.
- **T864.5** Add to the in-REPL `/help` output (same block that
  lists `/mcp`, `/cost`, etc).
- **T864.6** Add `tests/cli/interactive.queue.test.ts` covering:
  list with 0/1/many entries, clear-all, clear-by-index, invalid
  index. Mock `console.log` and assert on captured output.
- **T864.7** Run the full gate green.

## Issue #867: [provider] formatProviderError preserves error.cause

- **T867.1** Create `src/providers/format.ts` exporting
  `formatProviderError(err: unknown): string`. Branches: non-Error,
  Error without cause, Error with Error-shape cause (formats
  `name + message + optional code`). Hard cap recursion at depth 2.
- **T867.2** Wire into `src/core/orchestrator.ts` rethrow site:
  rewrite the rethrown error's `.message` to the formatted string
  when it differs. Do NOT wrap into a new class (preserves
  `instanceof AuthError` and similar checks).
- **T867.3** Same wire at `src/core/streamingOrchestrator.ts`
  rethrow site.
- **T867.4** New file `tests/providers/format.test.ts` with cases:
  undici `TypeError: fetch failed` + `cause:{name:'SocketError',
  message:'other side closed', code:'UND_ERR_SOCKET'}`, plain
  Error, non-Error input, depth-bound (cause.cause not walked).
- **T867.5** New file `tests/core/orchestrator.error.test.ts`:
  mock `src/providers/index.js` to reject with an undici-shape
  error; assert the rethrown `.message` contains the cause's name
  AND code.
- **T867.6** Run the full gate green.

## Issue #869: [config] Compaction token budgeting + headroom

- **T869.1** In `src/core/compaction.ts`, update
  `estimateMessagesTokens`: when at least one of `m.tokens.input`
  or `m.tokens.output` is a non-zero number, use
  `(m.tokens.input ?? 0) + (m.tokens.output ?? 0)`; otherwise
  fall back to chars/4. Keep the +4 per-message structural overhead.
- **T869.2** Extend `CompactionOptions` with optional
  `reserveOutputTokens?: number` (default 4096, matching the
  `maxTokens` used in `orchestrator.ts`).
- **T869.3** Overload `shouldCompact` to accept either the legacy
  `threshold?: number` positional or an options object
  `{ threshold?, reserveOutputTokens? }`. Compute
  `triggerTokens = max(0, maxContextTokens - reserveOutputTokens)`
  and compare current vs `triggerTokens * threshold / 100`.
- **T869.4** Update `compactConversation` so when an options bag
  with `reserveOutputTokens` is supplied, it grows the
  "to summarize" bucket from the head until
  `estimateMessagesTokens(toKeep) + summaryMaxTokens <= 0.8 *
  triggerTokens`. Preserve the last `preserveLastN` invariant
  unchanged.
- **T869.5** Extend `src/core/__tests__/compaction.test.ts` with
  three assertions: recorded tokens preferred, reserve protects
  output, post-compact second call does NOT re-trigger.
- **T869.6** Run the full gate green. Do NOT touch
  `SessionManager.checkAndCompact` in this issue -- intentional
  follow-up.

## Cross-issue gate reminder

Each issue lands as its own PR (`auto-implement.yml` creates one
PR per issue). Before opening each PR run:

```bash
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run format:check
npm run test:coverage
npm run build
```

40% line coverage is enforced by CI via jq on
`coverage/coverage-summary.json`. The new test files above are
sized to keep the moving average above that floor.
